Carter meets Dejah Thoris and Sola in the plaza. He discovers that the older women of the Thark retinue have been sabotaging Dejah, forcing her into hard labor with radium explosives due to jealousy of her status.
Carter approaches Dejah and Sola in the plaza under moonlight.
Carter reacts with protective anger to the news of sabotage.
Carter discovers Dejah's forced labor through her physical condition and Sola's revelation.
